## ruff check

session.assistant: Two line-length issues to fix. Let me address both:
session.tool_result:
1→"""Codespace remote execution helper. 2→ 3→Builds shell commands for streaming execution on codespaces. 4→Every remoteable command calls this with its own erk CLI string. 5→""" 6→ 7→import shlex 8→ 9→ 10→def build_codespace_ssh_command( 11→ erk_command: str, 12→ *, 13→ working_directory: str | None = None, 14→) -> str: 15→ """Wrap an erk CLI command for streaming codespace execution. 16→ 17→ Produces a bash command that: 18→ 1. Optionally cd to working_directory 19→ 2. Bootstraps the environment (git pull, uv sync, activate venv) 20→ 3. Runs the given erk command in the foreground, streaming output 21→ 22→ Args: 23→ erk_command: The erk CLI command to run remotely (e.g., "erk objective plan 42") 24→ working_directory: Remote directory to cd into before running commands, or None 25→ 26→ Returns: 27→ A shell string suitable for passing to codespace SSH 28→ """ 29→ cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" 30→ return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate && {erk_command}'"
... [6 lines omitted] ...

60→ # -t: Force pseudo-terminal allocation (required for interactive TUI like claude) 61→ # bash -l -c: Use login shell to ensure PATH is set up (claude installs to ~/.claude/local/) 62→ # 63→ # IMPORTANT: The entire remote command (bash -l -c '...') must be a single argument. 64→ # SSH concatenates command arguments with spaces without preserving grouping. 65→ working_dir = ctx.local_config.codespace_working_directory 66→ cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_dir)} && " if working_dir is not None else "" 67→ export_prefix = _build_export_prefix(env_vars) 68→ if shell: 69→ if export_prefix or cd_prefix: 70→ remote_command = f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{export_prefix}exec bash -l'" 71→ else: 72→ remote_command = "bash -l" 73→ else: 74→ setup_commands = "git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate" 75→ claude_command = "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions" 76→ remote_command = f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{export_prefix}{setup_commands} && {claude_command}'" 77→ 78→ click.echo(f"Connecting to codespace '{codespace.name}'...", err=True) 79→

session.tool_result:
Here's the exact diff output:
```diff --- src/erk/core/codespace_run.py +++ src/erk/core/codespace_run.py @@ -26,8 +26,6 @@ Returns: A shell string suitable for passing to codespace SSH """ - cd_prefix = ( - f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" - ) + cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" bootstrap = "git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate" return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{bootstrap} && {erk_command}'" ```
The formatting change removes the parentheses line break and condenses the `cd_prefix` assignment onto a single line. agentId: a498a97 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
